text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Well, my skin's been a bit dry recently, but
I'm otherwise doing fine.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No, no, it's nothing to see a doctor about!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Mother. I know you're probably
busy. You don't need to come to the academy...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You can't be serious! You're going to run all the way here and call it training?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's fine! I'm happy just knowing you care! Of
course... Yes... Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Mother's as full of energy as ever.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I forgot to ask her to send my moisturizer!
